description: Google Sheet mapping for the Weekly EBITDA workbook. Update spreadsheet_id after creating the sheet.
spreadsheet_id: PLACEHOLDER — fill after creating Google Sheet

zoho_spa_pl.description: Full P&L export from Zoho Books for Carisma Spa & Wellness International Ltd.
zoho_spa_pl.source: Zoho Books → Reports → Profit and Loss → Export

zoho_aesthetics_pl.description: Full P&L export from Zoho Books for Aesthetics entity.
zoho_aesthetics_pl.source: Zoho Books → Reports → Profit and Loss → Export

lapis_revenue.description: Revenue by spa location, split by Service vs Product. Already VAT-exclusive from Lapis.
lapis_revenue.source: Lapis POS → Quick Service Search + Material Report

lapis_cogs.description: Cost of goods sold by product line (Phytomer, Purest, Others) per spa.

payroll.description: Monthly payroll data by employee with spa assignment.

cash_salaries.description: Cash salary payments by employee with spa assignment.

sga_detail.description: SG&A line items with allocation categories. Must include the 3 pool totals and any direct allocations.

aesthetics_data.description: Aesthetics-specific data: revenue, doctor payouts, staff costs, COGS.

fixed_costs.description: Weekly proportional fixed costs (towels, linens, slippers, amenities). Each row is a cost item with its weekly amount. Allocated to spas by revenue ratio.

ebitda_summary.description: Group-level EBITDA by period. Spa total + Aesthetics + Slimming + Velvet.

spa_pl.description: Consolidated Spa P&L: Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Salaries, SG&A, Rent, EBITDA.

spa_detail.description: Per-spa P&L breakdown for all 8 locations + Corporate.

aesthetics_pl.description: Aesthetics and Slimming P&L with doctor payouts.

sga_allocation.description: Full SG&A allocation audit trail showing each method and direct allocations.

reconciliation.description: Revenue, Salaries, SG&A, and Rent checks with pass/fail and variance.
